# National Urology Center - Dr. Arun Shah

## Overview
Dr. Arun Shah is a highly experienced urologist and gold medalist based in Janakpur, Nepal. He provides world-class urological care at the National Urology Center.

## Specializations
- Kidney Stones (PCNL, URSL, RIRS laser surgery)
- Prostate Enlargement (HoLEP, TURP)
- Male Sexual Health & Erectile Dysfunction
- Urinary Tract Infections (UTI)
- Uro-oncology (Kidney, Prostate, Bladder Cancer)
- Pediatric Urology

## Contact Information
- **Phone:** +977-9744427743 or +977-9814834756
- **Email:** drarunshah24@gmail.com
- **Address:** National Urology Center, Janakpur, Dhanusha, Nepal
- **Website:** https://drarunshah.com.np
